name: Blast RPG
author: Poki
description: Prepare for blast off in Blast RPG! In this explosive adventure, you play as a brave knight who uses a cannon to shoot themselves towards faraway goals. While flying through the air, you can battle enemies by flying towards them. If you manage to defeat a monster before you run out of speed, you'll get a speed boost to get you even further! You can also buy upgrades and improve your characters attributes to launch your knight really far. Can you become the greatest adventurer in the land? How to play Blast RPG? Use the mouse to aim your cannon and steer your knight! Who created Blast RPG? Blast RPG was created by Nitrome. Check out their other games on Poki: fat-cat, Double Edged and Squawk ! How can I play Blast RPG for free? You can play Blast RPG for free on Poki. Can I play Blast RPG on mobile devices and desktop? Blast RPG can be played on your computer.
